title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Ebooks Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, trying to sell ebooks online, but Stripe isn't an option, and PayPal is unavailable in your country. You need a reliable and secure way to collect payments from customers worldwide, without breaking the bank or jumping through hoops. The good news is that there are alternatives to Stripe and PayPal, but the question is, which one will work best for you?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's take a closer look at the options available to you. PayPal and Stripe are both popular choices, but they come with significant restrictions for creators in certain countries. PayPal, for instance, has a list of countries where it doesn't operate, while Stripe is notorious for its strict requirements and limited support for non-traditional payment methods. Gumroad, on the other hand, is a popular platform for selling digital products, but it also has its own set of restrictions and limitations. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that offers a more liberal approach to payments, with 300+ coins supported and no KYC requirements. With NOWPayments, you can accept payments from customers across the globe, without worrying about payment processor account requirements or automated delivery complications.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal and Stripe have similar approaches. They both restrict access to certain countries or regions, citing various reasons such as compliance with local laws or regulations. Gumroad also has its own set of restrictions, but it's more transparent about its policies. NOWPayments, on the other hand, takes a more inclusive approach, allowing creators to accept payments from customers in over 200 countries and territories, including those where PayPal and Stripe are not available. This makes NOWPayments a more attractive option for creators who need to reach a global audience.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Another important consideration is payment speed and fees. PayPal and Stripe both charge processing fees, which can range from 2.9% to 4.5% per transaction, depending on the type of payment and the country of origin. Gumroad also charges fees, although they're generally lower than those of PayPal and Stripe. NOWPayments, on the other hand, charges a flat 0.5% transaction fee, regardless of the payment method or country of origin. This makes NOWPayments a more cost-effective option for creators who need to process high volumes of transactions.
PayPal and Stripe may be restricted in your country, but NOWPayments is a viable alternative.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Finally, let's talk about automation and delivery capabilities. NOWPayments offers a range of automated delivery options, including instant automated delivery, PDF receipts, and no payment processor account requirements. This makes it easier for creators to focus on what they do best – creating digital products – while NOWPayments handles the rest. With NOWPayments, you can also set up your own store infrastructure, using the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to get started, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is best for you? If you're looking for a reliable and secure way to collect payments from customers worldwide, without breaking the bank or jumping through hoops, NOWPayments is a great choice. With its inclusive approach to restricted countries, low transaction fees, and automated delivery capabilities, NOWPayments is the perfect solution for creators who need to reach a global audience.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers a flat 0.5% transaction fee, making it a cost-effective option for creators.
